HuntDescription.SourceString: Complete a mission comprised of 3 timed segments to earn carrot chips you can spend in the Springtide Shop. First, gather unhatched pufflehop eggs for study. Next, round up hatched pufflehops into the transport pen. Finally, defend your collected pufflehops from hungry styxians until your airship returns.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Complete a mission comprised of 3 timed segments to earn carrot chips you can spend in the Springtide Shop. First, gather unhatched pufflehop eggs for study. Next, round up hatched pufflehops into the transport pen. Finally, defend your collected pufflehops from hungry styxians until your airship returns.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Face the most dangerous level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Face the most dangerous level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Face the normal level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Face the normal level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A historic island used for Slayer camps during the construction of Ramsgate. Named for the city's founder, famed explorer Aulric Maas.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A historic island used for Slayer camps during the construction of Ramsgate. Named for the city's founder, famed explorer Aulric Maas.

HuntDescription.SourceString: An ore-rich island that was once heavily mined, Iron Falls was the source of many raw materials during Ramsgate's early boom years.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: An ore-rich island that was once heavily mined, Iron Falls was the source of many raw materials during Ramsgate's early boom years.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A recent arrival in the Ram formation, the island of Burning Rose is a warm, dry island rich in blaze aether. It may have once been home to an Andari settlement.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A recent arrival in the Ram formation, the island of Burning Rose is a warm, dry island rich in blaze aether. It may have once been home to an Andari settlement.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Behemoths have consumed much of this arid island's original archonite deposits, causing its elevation to drop precipitously.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Behemoths have consumed much of this arid island's original archonite deposits, causing its elevation to drop precipitously.

HuntDescription.SourceString: This frozen island has drifted into the Ram formation from the cold depths of the Sky Below.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: This frozen island has drifted into the Ram formation from the cold depths of the Sky Below.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The Orrery believes Frostmarch is an undeveloped chunk of pre-Upheaval terrain that was frozen in time - literally - many centuries ago.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The Orrery believes Frostmarch is an undeveloped chunk of pre-Upheaval terrain that was frozen in time - literally - many centuries ago.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A forested isle that serves as a vantage point from the charted skies into the swirling Maelstrom. The explorers who named it found the massive storm to be a revelatory experience.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A forested isle that serves as a vantage point from the charted skies into the swirling Maelstrom. The explorers who named it found the massive storm to be a revelatory experience.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A dangerous forest island on a course that brushes up against the Maelstrom, Underwald is occupied by Behemoths that feed off the storm’s chaotic power.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A dangerous forest island on a course that brushes up against the Maelstrom, Underwald is occupied by Behemoths that feed off the storm’s chaotic power.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Many Slayers believe the Lesser Gnasher to be easy prey... until its lesser tail smashes them flat.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Many Slayers believe the Lesser Gnasher to be easy prey... until its lesser tail smashes them flat.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The shocking range of the Drask's power makes even this lesser variety a deadly threat for an unprepared Slayer.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The shocking range of the Drask's power makes even this lesser variety a deadly threat for an unprepared Slayer.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The Lesser Boreus may not be as large or strong as more mature varieties, but it still dominates its minions with psionic force and quite effectively uses frost aether to shield itself from attack.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The Lesser Boreus may not be as large or strong as more mature varieties, but it still dominates its minions with psionic force and quite effectively uses frost aether to shield itself from attack.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A fast and ferocious Behemoth that has not yet fed on enough blaze aether to unleash fiery attacks on those who hunt it, a Lesser Embermane is still not a quarry to be underestimated. Quick attacks and agile tactics are recommended.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A fast and ferocious Behemoth that has not yet fed on enough blaze aether to unleash fiery attacks on those who hunt it, a Lesser Embermane is still not a quarry to be underestimated. Quick attacks and agile tactics are recommended.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The winged terror known as the Shrike generates localized vortexes and uses its massive frame to drop on prey from above with crushing force. Despite a commonly held belief among rookie Slayers, it does not hoot.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The winged terror known as the Shrike generates localized vortexes and uses its massive frame to drop on prey from above with crushing force. Despite a commonly held belief among rookie Slayers, it does not hoot.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A reptilian Behemoth that can manipulate terra aether to armour its own body with stone. More than mere protection, the Skarn can use these hunks of rock to batter foes to death.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A reptilian Behemoth that can manipulate terra aether to armour its own body with stone. More than mere protection, the Skarn can use these hunks of rock to batter foes to death.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths of dire power.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths of dire power.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of blaze aether.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of blaze aether.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of frost aether.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of frost aether.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for dire Behemoths in a classic test of power that goes beyond the heroic. Only one revive provided per Slayer.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for dire Behemoths in a classic test of power that goes beyond the heroic. Only one revive provided per Slayer.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for dire Behemoths of heroic difficulty.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for dire Behemoths of heroic difficulty.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of raw aether.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of raw aether.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of shock aether.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of shock aether.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of terra aether.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Patrol for Behemoths that feed on the power of terra aether.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A burrowing raw aether-feeder possessing mammalian and reptilian characteristics. Its powerful tail can flatten an unwary Slayer while its heavy incisors can sever a limb in a single bite.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A burrowing raw aether-feeder possessing mammalian and reptilian characteristics. Its powerful tail can flatten an unwary Slayer while its heavy incisors can sever a limb in a single bite.

HuntDescription.SourceString: As Gnashers mature they feed not only on aether, but their own rage. Dangerous prey for unprepared Slayers, but common targets for veterans looking to keep their edge during slow hunting seasons.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: As Gnashers mature they feed not only on aether, but their own rage. Dangerous prey for unprepared Slayers, but common targets for veterans looking to keep their edge during slow hunting seasons.

HuntDescription.SourceString: As Gnashers mature they feed not only on aether, but their own rage. Dangerous prey for unprepared Slayers, but common targets for veterans looking to keep their edge during slow hunting seasons.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: As Gnashers mature they feed not only on aether, but their own rage. Dangerous prey for unprepared Slayers, but common targets for veterans looking to keep their edge during slow hunting seasons.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Those who believe light to be nothing but harmless energy have never encountered a Rezakiri. This insectoid terror is a master of Radiant aether and can fill the air around Slayers with murderous bolts of energy. Attacking one alone is not recommended.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Those who believe light to be nothing but harmless energy have never encountered a Rezakiri. This insectoid terror is a master of Radiant aether and can fill the air around Slayers with murderous bolts of energy. Attacking one alone is not recommended.

HuntDescription.SourceString: This bizarre Behemoth feeds on raw aether that its body metabolizes into razor-sharp spines. It can then fling these massive quills into the air to rain down on anything or anyone foolish enough to be standing there when they arrive.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: This bizarre Behemoth feeds on raw aether that its body metabolizes into razor-sharp spines. It can then fling these massive quills into the air to rain down on anything or anyone foolish enough to be standing there when they arrive.

HuntDescription.SourceString: This bizarre Behemoth feeds on raw aether that its body metabolizes into razor-sharp spines. It can then fling these massive quills into the air to rain down on anything or anyone foolish enough to be standing there when they arrive.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: This bizarre Behemoth feeds on raw aether that its body metabolizes into razor-sharp spines. It can then fling these massive quills into the air to rain down on anything or anyone foolish enough to be standing there when they arrive.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The larger, stronger, and older a Quillshot gets, the more accurately it can fling the spines growing from its back. The Deadeye can impale an entire team of unprepared Slayers without so much as breaking a sweat.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The larger, stronger, and older a Quillshot gets, the more accurately it can fling the spines growing from its back. The Deadeye can impale an entire team of unprepared Slayers without so much as breaking a sweat.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The larger, stronger, and older a Quillshot gets, the more accurately it can fling the spines growing from its back. The Deadeye can impale an entire team of unprepared Slayers without so much as breaking a sweat.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The larger, stronger, and older a Quillshot gets, the more accurately it can fling the spines growing from its back. The Deadeye can impale an entire team of unprepared Slayers without so much as breaking a sweat.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A mysterious, enigmatic Behemoth found on the border between the Shattered Isles and the Maelstrom beyond. A frightening avian that feeds on dark umbral aether, it may not be truly evil - but it's close enough. Few would attempt to hunt one alone.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A mysterious, enigmatic Behemoth found on the border between the Shattered Isles and the Maelstrom beyond. A frightening avian that feeds on dark umbral aether, it may not be truly evil - but it's close enough. Few would attempt to hunt one alone.

HuntDescription.SourceString: While its long, snapping jaws can crush bone and steel with equal ease, the Nayzaga's most dangerous weapon is its shocking quills, which it uses to assault Slayers from every direction.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: While its long, snapping jaws can crush bone and steel with equal ease, the Nayzaga's most dangerous weapon is its shocking quills, which it uses to assault Slayers from every direction.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Older Nayzagas can launch their shock quills with greater accuracy and intensity, while their powerful jaws only grow stronger over time.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Older Nayzagas can launch their shock quills with greater accuracy and intensity, while their powerful jaws only grow stronger over time.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Older Nayzagas can launch their shock quills with greater accuracy and intensity, while their powerful jaws only grow stronger over time.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Older Nayzagas can launch their shock quills with greater accuracy and intensity, while their powerful jaws only grow stronger over time.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Even at a distance, the shock-driven power of the reptilian Drask can lay even the most grounded Slayer low.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Even at a distance, the shock-driven power of the reptilian Drask can lay even the most grounded Slayer low.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The mighty Boreus is the maestro of frozen mayhem, controlling a pack of beastly minions with its powerful psionic abilities and manipulating frost aether to attack foes and defend itself.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The mighty Boreus is the maestro of frozen mayhem, controlling a pack of beastly minions with its powerful psionic abilities and manipulating frost aether to attack foes and defend itself.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The fearsome Dreadfrost Boreus consumes frost aether and commands beastly minions with its uncanny psionic power. These creatures act as extensions of the Behemoth itself, drawing on their master's strength while intercepting any harm Slayers might try to inflict.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The fearsome Dreadfrost Boreus consumes frost aether and commands beastly minions with its uncanny psionic power. These creatures act as extensions of the Behemoth itself, drawing on their master's strength while intercepting any harm Slayers might try to inflict.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The fearsome Dreadfrost Boreus consumes frost aether and commands beastly minions with its uncanny psionic power. These creatures act as extensions of the Behemoth itself, drawing on their master's strength while intercepting any harm Slayers might try to inflict.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The fearsome Dreadfrost Boreus consumes frost aether and commands beastly minions with its uncanny psionic power. These creatures act as extensions of the Behemoth itself, drawing on their master's strength while intercepting any harm Slayers might try to inflict.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A cousin of the Pangar, the Hellion is a heavily armoured blaze-feeder. Rumours that the Hellion was created when a Slayer used a blaze weapon on an unsuspecting Pangar cannot be confirmed.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A cousin of the Pangar, the Hellion is a heavily armoured blaze-feeder. Rumours that the Hellion was created when a Slayer used a blaze weapon on an unsuspecting Pangar cannot be confirmed.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Scorchstone Hellions have feasted upon the blaze aether of the Shattered Isles and grown devastatingly strong. To face a Scorchstone is to battle a living volcano, one that can incinerate unsuspecting Slayers in an eruption of molten pain.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Scorchstone Hellions have feasted upon the blaze aether of the Shattered Isles and grown devastatingly strong. To face a Scorchstone is to battle a living volcano, one that can incinerate unsuspecting Slayers in an eruption of molten pain.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Scorchstone Hellions have feasted upon the blaze aether of the Shattered Isles and grown devastatingly strong. To face a Scorchstone is to battle a living volcano, one that can incinerate unsuspecting Slayers in an eruption of molten pain.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Scorchstone Hellions have feasted upon the blaze aether of the Shattered Isles and grown devastatingly strong. To face a Scorchstone is to battle a living volcano, one that can incinerate unsuspecting Slayers in an eruption of molten pain.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Many are the Slayers who have fallen prey to the furious energy of this blaze-feeding terror. Fast and deadly, the Embermane is an inferno on four legs.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Many are the Slayers who have fallen prey to the furious energy of this blaze-feeding terror. Fast and deadly, the Embermane is an inferno on four legs.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The dreaded Bloodfire variety of Embermane has been responsible for the destruction of countless woodland in the Shattered Isles.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The dreaded Bloodfire variety of Embermane has been responsible for the destruction of countless woodland in the Shattered Isles.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The dreaded Bloodfire variety of Embermane has been responsible for the destruction of countless woodland in the Shattered Isles.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The dreaded Bloodfire variety of Embermane has been responsible for the destruction of countless woodland in the Shattered Isles.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A rolling avalanche given living form, the Pangar is a heavily armoured Behemoth that uses its mighty tusks to battle Slayers and burrow into islands seeking frost archonite to consume.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A rolling avalanche given living form, the Pangar is a heavily armoured Behemoth that uses its mighty tusks to battle Slayers and burrow into islands seeking frost archonite to consume.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The first Frostback a Slayer encountered was mistaken for a small mountain. Unfortunately, the Slayer in question learned their mistake far too late.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The first Frostback a Slayer encountered was mistaken for a small mountain. Unfortunately, the Slayer in question learned their mistake far too late.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The first Frostback a Slayer encountered was mistaken for a small mountain. Unfortunately, the Slayer in question learned their mistake far too late.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The first Frostback a Slayer encountered was mistaken for a small mountain. Unfortunately, the Slayer in question learned their mistake far too late.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Preferring to stalk its island home by the light of the night sky, the Moonreaver possesses all the ferocity and flying abilities of its smaller cousins, but amplified by age and raw aether to a terrifying degree.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Preferring to stalk its island home by the light of the night sky, the Moonreaver possesses all the ferocity and flying abilities of its smaller cousins, but amplified by age and raw aether to a terrifying degree.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Preferring to stalk its island home by the light of the night sky, the Moonreaver possesses all the ferocity and flying abilities of its smaller cousins, but amplified by age and raw aether to a terrifying degree.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Preferring to stalk its island home by the light of the night sky, the Moonreaver possesses all the ferocity and flying abilities of its smaller cousins, but amplified by age and raw aether to a terrifying degree.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The mighty Koshai, Sovereign of Thorns uses its aetheric control of vines, bramble, and barbs to devastating effect against Slayers, rooting its foes in place and demanding new tactics. And some are more devastatingly powerful than others, demanding a truly heroic effort to defeat them.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The mighty Koshai, Sovereign of Thorns uses its aetheric control of vines, bramble, and barbs to devastating effect against Slayers, rooting its foes in place and demanding new tactics. And some are more devastatingly powerful than others, demanding a truly heroic effort to defeat them.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The mighty Koshai, Sovereign of Thorns uses its aetheric control of vines, bramble, and barbs to devastating effect against Slayers, rooting its foes in place and demanding new tactics. And some are more devastatingly powerful than others, demanding a truly heroic effort to defeat them.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The mighty Koshai, Sovereign of Thorns uses its aetheric control of vines, bramble, and barbs to devastating effect against Slayers, rooting its foes in place and demanding new tactics. And some are more devastatingly powerful than others, demanding a truly heroic effort to defeat them.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The aptly named Rockfall Skarn has even greater control over terra aether than its younger counterparts. If it isn’t pulling rocks and earth into a swirling cyclone of bludgeoning death that can crush even the most cautious Slayers, the Rockfall is wrenching columns of jagged stone from the ground below that will knock them off their feet.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The aptly named Rockfall Skarn has even greater control over terra aether than its younger counterparts. If it isn’t pulling rocks and earth into a swirling cyclone of bludgeoning death that can crush even the most cautious Slayers, the Rockfall is wrenching columns of jagged stone from the ground below that will knock them off their feet.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The aptly named Rockfall Skarn has even greater control over terra aether than its younger counterparts. If it isn’t pulling rocks and earth into a swirling cyclone of bludgeoning death that can crush even the most cautious Slayers, the Rockfall is wrenching columns of jagged stone from the ground below that will knock them off their feet.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The aptly named Rockfall Skarn has even greater control over terra aether than its younger counterparts. If it isn’t pulling rocks and earth into a swirling cyclone of bludgeoning death that can crush even the most cautious Slayers, the Rockfall is wrenching columns of jagged stone from the ground below that will knock them off their feet.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A walking aether furnace with tough, armoured hide, the Charrogg feeds on blaze energy and uses it to blast cruel jets of flame in all directions.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A walking aether furnace with tough, armoured hide, the Charrogg feeds on blaze energy and uses it to blast cruel jets of flame in all directions.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Even veteran Slayers fear the molten wrath of the Firebrand. Years spent feeding on blaze energy transforms them into living crucibles capable of incinerating everything in sight.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Even veteran Slayers fear the molten wrath of the Firebrand. Years spent feeding on blaze energy transforms them into living crucibles capable of incinerating everything in sight.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Even veteran Slayers fear the molten wrath of the Firebrand. Years spent feeding on blaze energy transforms them into living crucibles capable of incinerating everything in sight.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Even veteran Slayers fear the molten wrath of the Firebrand. Years spent feeding on blaze energy transforms them into living crucibles capable of incinerating everything in sight.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Descending from the dazzling echelons of the skies above to terrorize the Maelstrom, the Valomyr can slice Slayers to ribbons with radiant power sharper than any shattered glass.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Descending from the dazzling echelons of the skies above to terrorize the Maelstrom, the Valomyr can slice Slayers to ribbons with radiant power sharper than any shattered glass.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Descending from the dazzling echelons of the skies above to terrorize the Maelstrom, the Valomyr can slice Slayers to ribbons with radiant power sharper than any shattered glass.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Descending from the dazzling echelons of the skies above to terrorize the Maelstrom, the Valomyr can slice Slayers to ribbons with radiant power sharper than any shattered glass.

HuntDescription.SourceString: An unusual insectoid Behemoth species that consumes terra aether, the Kharabak generally remains airborne and can launch stinging swarms of tiny clones to torment unready Slayers.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: An unusual insectoid Behemoth species that consumes terra aether, the Kharabak generally remains airborne and can launch stinging swarms of tiny clones to torment unready Slayers.

HuntDescription.SourceString: As Kharabaks age, their exoskeletons take on a more violet hue that warns all but the most foolish foes that they are facing a truly dangerous foe.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: As Kharabaks age, their exoskeletons take on a more violet hue that warns all but the most foolish foes that they are facing a truly dangerous foe.

HuntDescription.SourceString: As Kharabaks age, their exoskeletons take on a more violet hue that warns all but the most foolish foes that they are facing a truly dangerous foe.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: As Kharabaks age, their exoskeletons take on a more violet hue that warns all but the most foolish foes that they are facing a truly dangerous foe.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A cunning hunter steeped in shadowy power, the recently rediscovered Riftstalker has quickly expanded its territory into the outer fringes of the Ram formation. This sleek predator manipulates umbral aether to tear portals into reality itself - disappearing and reappearing in the blink of an eye.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A cunning hunter steeped in shadowy power, the recently rediscovered Riftstalker has quickly expanded its territory into the outer fringes of the Ram formation. This sleek predator manipulates umbral aether to tear portals into reality itself - disappearing and reappearing in the blink of an eye.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A cunning hunter steeped in shadowy power, the recently rediscovered Riftstalker has quickly expanded its territory into the outer fringes of the Ram formation. This sleek predator manipulates umbral aether to tear portals into reality itself - disappearing and reappearing in the blink of an eye.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A cunning hunter steeped in shadowy power, the recently rediscovered Riftstalker has quickly expanded its territory into the outer fringes of the Ram formation. This sleek predator manipulates umbral aether to tear portals into reality itself - disappearing and reappearing in the blink of an eye.

HuntDescription.SourceString: A living dynamo, the Stormclaw both consumes and generates crackling shock aether. Their power can stop the heart of the most determined Slayer and generate shocking barriers that pen in its foes.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: A living dynamo, the Stormclaw both consumes and generates crackling shock aether. Their power can stop the heart of the most determined Slayer and generate shocking barriers that pen in its foes.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Carrying the fury of the Maelstrom itself within its electric heart, the Tempestborne Stormclaw is faster, stronger, and even more steeped in the power of shock aether than its younger relatives. Insulation is highly recommended.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Carrying the fury of the Maelstrom itself within its electric heart, the Tempestborne Stormclaw is faster, stronger, and even more steeped in the power of shock aether than its younger relatives. Insulation is highly recommended.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Carrying the fury of the Maelstrom itself within its electric heart, the Tempestborne Stormclaw is faster, stronger, and even more steeped in the power of shock aether than its younger relatives. Insulation is highly recommended.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Carrying the fury of the Maelstrom itself within its electric heart, the Tempestborne Stormclaw is faster, stronger, and even more steeped in the power of shock aether than its younger relatives. Insulation is highly recommended.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The Winterhorn Skraev is a powerhouse of frost aether and cold fury. Possessing the same innate abilities as normal examples of the species, the Winterhorn can also infuse the very ground beneath a Slayer’s feet with spiking waves of punishing ice and trigger whiteout conditions more dangerous than the fiercest blizzards.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The Winterhorn Skraev is a powerhouse of frost aether and cold fury. Possessing the same innate abilities as normal examples of the species, the Winterhorn can also infuse the very ground beneath a Slayer’s feet with spiking waves of punishing ice and trigger whiteout conditions more dangerous than the fiercest blizzards.

HuntDescription.SourceString: The Winterhorn Skraev is a powerhouse of frost aether and cold fury. Possessing the same innate abilities as normal examples of the species, the Winterhorn can also infuse the very ground beneath a Slayer’s feet with spiking waves of punishing ice and trigger whiteout conditions more dangerous than the fiercest blizzards.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: The Winterhorn Skraev is a powerhouse of frost aether and cold fury. Possessing the same innate abilities as normal examples of the species, the Winterhorn can also infuse the very ground beneath a Slayer’s feet with spiking waves of punishing ice and trigger whiteout conditions more dangerous than the fiercest blizzards.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Nothing chills a Slayer's heart like the screeching call of this frost-feeding avian Behemoth. First it freezes foes in place. Then it shatters their bodies with devastating strikes.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Nothing chills a Slayer's heart like the screeching call of this frost-feeding avian Behemoth. First it freezes foes in place. Then it shatters their bodies with devastating strikes.

HuntDescription.CultureInvariantString: Face the normal level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.
Face the normal level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.
Face the normal level of difficulty on Lady Luck's Island of Trials.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Visit a training area to bash on dummy Behemoths with your choice of weapon. Try out something new or practice your combos to reach peak Slayer performance.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Visit a training area to bash on dummy Behemoths with your choice of weapon. Try out something new or practice your combos to reach peak Slayer performance.

HuntDescription.SourceString: Return to Ramsgate, the heart of the Shattered Isles Frontier.
HuntDescription.LocalizedString: Return to Ramsgate, the heart of the Shattered Isles Frontier.

Other Behemoths: Lesser Gnasher
